summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Anka CS Hub Phase 2 features. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend components working correctly including new tabs, buttons, and alert type icons.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with gayatri.garg@anka.health (falls back to admin if not exists)
Backend: GET /api/templates contains innovation_update and policy_impact_brief templates
Backend: POST /api/clients/{id}/mark-innovation-briefed works correctly
Backend: POST /api/weekly-summary generates AI summary
Backend: GET /api/policy-updates returns list
Backend: POST /api/policy-updates creates policy
Backend: POST /api/policy-updates/{id}/generate-alerts creates client-specific alerts
Backend: GET /api/email-cadences returns list
Backend: POST /api/email-cadences creates cadence
Backend: GET /api/email-cadences?client_id filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns logs with filtering
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs?action_type filter works
Backend: PATCH /api/followups/{id} creates audit log entry
Backend: GET /api/alerts returns all alerts
Backend: GET /api/alerts?alert_type filter works
Frontend: Settings > Policies tab visible with Add Policy Update button
Frontend: Settings > Policies tab shows empty state when no policies
Frontend: Settings > Audit tab shows audit logs with filters (Action Type, Start Date, End Date)
Frontend: Client Detail > Overview shows Innovation Briefing card with Mark as Briefed button
Frontend: Client Detail > Weekly Summary tab with Generate Summary button
Frontend: Client Detail > Email Cadences tab with Add Cadence button
Frontend: Client Detail > Add Cadence dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Alerts page shows alert type icons (clock for engagement_gap, bell for renewal, document for policy_update, etc)
Frontend: Alerts page shows colored severity badges (critical red, high red, medium amber)
Frontend: Alerts page has Alert Type filter dropdown
Frontend: Follow-Ups page shows Call Required (phone icon) and Email OK (mail icon) badges
Frontend: Follow-Ups page has status and category filters
Frontend: Follow-Ups page empty state code implemented (shows green checkmark when filtered to 0 items)
Frontend: Performance tab shows charts (Performance Trends, Top Denial Codes, Payer Breakdown)
critical_code_review_comments: Team Productivity card only renders when performance[0].claims_processed exists - this is correct conditional rendering
Empty state in FollowUpsPage uses CheckCircle icon with green color and 'All caught up!' message - correctly implemented
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds innovation_update and policy_impact_brief templates on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 features (13 tasks) working correctly. Templates seeded. Alert type icons showing in AlertsPage. New tabs (Weekly Summary, Email Cadences) in ClientDetailPage. Policies tab in SettingsPage. Audit logging working with filters. Innovation Briefing button functional.

phase_2_features_verified.1_followup_audit_logging: PASS - PATCH /api/followups/{id} creates audit log entry
phase_2_features_verified.4_policy_auto_checks: PASS - POST /api/policy-updates/{id}/generate-alerts creates alerts for affected clients
phase_2_features_verified.5_cadence_auto_checks: PASS - Email cadence endpoints working (GET, POST, PATCH)
phase_2_features_verified.6_team_productivity_fields: PASS - PerformanceRecord model includes claims_processed, avg_turnaround_days, team_size
phase_2_features_verified.7_innovation_briefed_button: PASS - Mark as Briefed button visible in ClientDetailPage Overview
phase_2_features_verified.8_policy_updates_tab: PASS - Policies tab visible in SettingsPage with Add Policy Update button
phase_2_features_verified.9_weekly_summary_component: PASS - Weekly Summary tab with Generate Summary button in ClientDetailPage
phase_2_features_verified.10_email_cadences_component: PASS - Email Cadences tab with Add Cadence button in ClientDetailPage
phase_2_features_verified.11_team_productivity_card: PASS - Code exists in ClientDetailPage Performance tab (conditional on claims_processed)
phase_2_features_verified.12_alert_type_icons: PASS - AlertsPage shows type icons (Clock for engagement_gap, Bell for renewal, etc)
phase_2_features_verified.13_followups_empty_state: PASS - CheckCircle with 'All caught up!' message when filteredFollowups.length === 0
